parameters.perturbation_scope: multi-head K-only (2-8 heads at ALL positions and ALL layers)

prediction_outcome: Scenario C CONFIRMED (20% confidence). Two-regime pattern does NOT replicate on Llama. Near-complete collapse for all pairs.
key_finding: DISCONFIRMATORY: Two-regime redundancy curve is Qwen-specific. Llama best pair: 16.2% (vs Qwen 98.8%). Gap +16.2pp (vs +95.1pp). 31/37 fail both pairs. Head-level redundancy near-zero on analog model.
evidence_impact: Revises answer-head specialization from 'universal decisive' to 'encoding-dependent'. Digital encoding provides ~83pp more head-level redundancy. Two-regime pattern added to disconfirmed claims.
next_planned: Finer threshold sweep (1-2 head transition) OR Qwen-Instruct (mixed encoding) replication OR Phase 6 synthesis

null_space_existence.status: CONFIRMED in K-space (p=0.013). Narrow but real. Qwen-specific.

spatial_structure.status: DECISIVELY DISCONFIRMED for selectivity. Positional dissociation confirmed. HEAD-LEVEL CONCENTRATION decisive on Qwen, weak on Llama.

positional_dissociation.status: Dose-saturated: 5% dose STILL saturates Llama accuracy. Text gradient dose-independent. Encoding-dependent at 5%.

geometric_dissociation.status: K > V UNIVERSAL at per-head level: 16/16 heads across 2 models. V=456/456 absolute.

head_level_analysis.status: COMPLETE: Two-regime on Qwen (decisive), near-collapse on Llama (disconfirmatory). Head specialization is encoding-dependent.

natural_usage.status: H2O/TC protection via position. TC best protection metric.

cross_model_replication.status: COMPLETE: 4 families, 5 variants. Multi-head on 2 models. Head-level redundancy encoding-dependent.

encoding_strategy.status: COMPLETE TAXONOMY + head-level redundancy encoding-dependent confirmed at multi-head level.
